content.query:
DROP TABLE [EDW].[DIM_ERP_BATCH]
GO

SET ANSI_NULLS ON
GO
SET QUOTED_IDENTIFIER ON
GO

CREATE TABLE [EDW].[DIM_ERP_BATCH]
( 
	[BatchNumber] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[BranchID] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[Module] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[PostPeriod] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[BatchTranPeriodID] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[BatchDescription] [nvarchar](1000)  NULL,
	[CreatedOn] [datetime2](7)  NULL
)
WITH
(
	DISTRIBUTION = REPLICATE,
	CLUSTERED COLUMNSTORE INDEX
)
GO
